title: Hatimura Temple
tagline: Hatimura Temple — spiritual town of Assam

overview.short: The Hatimura Temple is a Hindu temple (Shakti Pitha), located at Hatimura Post office Jakhalabandha, Nagaon district of Assam, India.
overview.description: The Hatimura Temple is a Hindu temple (Shakti Pitha), located at Hatimura Post office Jakhalabandha, Nagaon district of Assam, India. It was built during the reign of Ahom king Pramatta Singha in 1667 Sakabda (1745-46 CE). It used to be an important center of Shaktism in ancient Assam. The presiding goddess is Durga which is known here as Mahisamardini.

topPlaces.name: Silghat
topPlaces.description: Silghat is a town located on the southern banks of the Brahmaputra, in Nagaon district in the Indian state of Assam. It is 48 km northeast of Nagaon.

topPlaces.name: Gamiripal, Sonitpur
topPlaces.description: Gamiripal, also known as Hukai Gaon or Kumar gaon, is a village in Jamugurihat of Sonitpur district, in the Indian state of Assam.

items.note: Silghat is a town located on the southern banks of the Brahmaputra, in Nagaon district in the Indian state of Assam. It is 48 km northeast of Nagaon.
Gamiripal, also known as Hukai Gaon or Kumar gaon, is a village in Jamugurihat of Sonitpur district, in the Indian state of Assam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Hatimura Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Hatimura Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Hatimura Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Dimapur Airport (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Dimapur Railway Station (107 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Hatimura Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Hatimura Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Hatimura Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Hatimura Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Hatimura Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Silghat, Gamiripal, Sonitpur.
